name: Fandango Showtimes
description: Fandango scraper: now-playing lists by ZIP/city, per-movie metadata, theater details, coming-soon, and showtimes. Each URL pattern is its own mechanism so the orchestrator can route 'what's playing', 'tell me about Dune', 'movies near me', and 'what's at Starlight Empire' independently.
examples: what time is avatar playing tonight
what movies are playing this weekend
what's coming to theaters next month

user.label: Default ZIP code
user.description: 5-digit US ZIP code Fandango uses to look up nearby theaters. Required.

user.label: Home theater
user.description: Name (or part of the name) of your usual theater. When set, showtimes from this venue are pinned to the top with a highlighted block; other nearby theaters appear below. Substring match — 'cinemark post' will match 'Galaxy Cinemas 16'.

user.label: Showtimes cache TTL
user.description: How long to reuse the day's showtimes before re-fetching. Defaults to 'until_local_midnight' (cache once per day). Use a number of seconds (e.g. 1800), 'until_local_midnight', or 'off' to disable.
